name: Intel 8080 CPU (programmable)
author: Velxio
description: Programmable Intel 8080 chip. Add a chip-program file to the project (.s for 8080 assembly, .hex for Intel HEX, .bin for raw bytes), click Compile, then Run. The same chip runs any 8080 program — make a mini PC, a calculator, an LED show, the Kill-the-Bit game, anything that fits in 32 KB. Memory map: ROM at 0x0000, RAM at 0x8000, MMIO at 0xC000 (LEDs/buttons/UART).
